caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or radio show. He is wearing a green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" and a green cap. The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems engaged in conversation, occasionally looking off to the side, possibly interacting with someone off-camera. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional recording session.
